feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,227Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 60

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Stay
entry.summary:
Author: MEEPducks12

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 608Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: Um this is my first thing so comments are appreciated After a brutal run-in with hunters leaves Derek Hale barely standing, the last person he expects to find him is Stiles Stilinski. Stiles refuses to leave, even when danger is far from over, forcing Derek to confront something he’s been avoiding—trust. As tension fades into something quieter, one night in the loft changes everything between them.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski
  • Original Children of Derek Hale and Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: Stiles and his seven wolves
entry.summary:
Author: Luciusnguyen

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,087Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 139

Summary: At the age of 11, Stiles discovered that he could talk to animals! And then things just escalated from there. Okay, so I rewatched Snow White and the Seven Dwarves recently and then I thought, what if Stiles could talk to animals? Like an Animal Whisperer? What would happen if Stiles could do that and how the story would be different if Stiles had power from the beginning? And then I did some research and holy cow, I found something very interesting in Poland's folklore. Thus, I used it in my story, I hope you guys like it. P/s: I’m really, really bad at writing summaries :(

entry.title: Hale Blood, Stilinski Chaos, Dutton Country
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,000Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: Stilinski & Hale family hit the Dutton Ranch and nothing stays calm for long. Isabelle draws attention she didn’t ask for, Peter gets possessive in record time, Derek decides bull riding is a personality now, and Stiles is 50% concern, 50% distracted appreciation. Beth Dutton stirs chaos like it’s cardio, Rip judges everyone equally, and John Dutton tries to keep the peace while slowly realizing that’s not happening. Cowboys, wolves, tension, and absolutely no emotional safety in sight.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: For the Moon Goddess
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,143Chapters: 43/43Kudos: 139

Summary: Stiles is a new novice at the Beacon Hills Temple of the Moon Goddess, where the priests have forsworn all women and have ritual sex to make seminal offerings to their deity. In an AU where a moon cult is the dominant religion in an alternate fantasy-type world, Stiles navigates friendship, love, and a confusing priesthood that has way too many rules about sex for basically being Sex University.A lot of other pairings along the way, but from the beginning, this story is about how we get to Sterek.

entry.title: The Stilinski Twins vs. The Hale Men (Sandwich Edition)
entry.summary:
Author: WolfFeller

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 958Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: A simple rest stop. Six sandwiches. One very bad decision.Left alone for ten minutes, the Stilinski twins do what they do best: cause chaos. Every sandwich gets “sampled,” favorites are claimed, and the evidence is poorly concealed.Peter and Derek return to betrayal, bite marks, and the harsh reminder that loving a Stilinski requires an unreasonable amount of patience.Montana isn’t ready for this.

entry.title: The Road to Sacramento
entry.summary:
Author: hyacinth_fiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 94,065Chapters: 24/25Kudos: 79

Summary: The universe has a wonderful sense of timing and Stiles and co. are thrown into all kinds of antics when the world goes to hell in a handbasket. Join them as they journey away from the security of their old lives and towards the hope of a new safety. Do they make it? I suppose you'll have to read on to find out. This story is going to be slow burn, like that languid yearning we all know and love seasoned with well-ripened apocalypse angst. There will be spice in this tale, eventually. Solid trigger warning for canon-typical blood/violence, casual swearing, and some other bits I'll stick in the notes of the relevant chapters

entry.title: Part Two: Spider Bites
entry.summary:
Author: FastFadingFiction

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,250Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: When Peter hides a Midtown field trip to Oscorp so he can have one normal school experience, a spider bite turns that fragile normal into a nightmare. As Tony, May, Stiles, Harley, and Derek race to save him, buried family bonds, dangerous secrets, and illegal experiments collide, and Peter wakes up changed in ways none of them are ready for.

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,660Chapters: 4/14Kudos: 7

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

entry.title: Don’t go where I can’t
entry.summary:
Author: WhoSaidImFin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,665Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Stiles and Derek have been married for two years, and for once, life in Beacon Hills is quiet — until Stiles is brutally attacked while investigating something near a lake and left fighting for his life. Derek is forced to watch helplessly as he’s put on a ventilator, slips into a coma, and nearly dies, and even when Stiles wakes, the wounds don’t heal normally and the nightmares don’t stop. As recovery turns into something far more complicated, both of them struggle with fear, guilt, and the reality that almost losing each other changes everything.

entry.title: decisions
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 360Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: Stiles tastes like salt. It invades Derek’s senses when they press their lips together, when Derek kisses him so very softly. It doesn’t take the pain away, it doesn’t fix Stiles or their fucked up lives. But it’s a hint of something better, and the press of Derek’s lips against Stiles’ is like breathing in new life, a different perspective, something reassuring that tries its best to lead him away from the torment that racks him.

entry.title: Not just a useless human (English version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,431Chapters: 11/18Kudos: 6

Summary: Stiles Stilinski is alone. Scott abandoned him to join Derek's pack, and he's not welcome. He tries to build a new life, but trouble seems to be targeting him even though he's cut ties with the supernatural. Alpha packs, serial killers, and now a disease he hoped he wouldn't have. Stiles will soon discover that everything he knew about himself was a lie.

entry.title: [Podfic] Trading Up
entry.summary:
Author: whimsicalmeerkat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Stiles is turning away from the stationery store he and his (maybe) girlfriend have been looking in to follow her to the next window when she softly says “Daaaamn” and steps three feet to the side, dropping his hand in the process. Confused, he looks over and follows her eyes to a man she’s staring at with a look on her face she’s definitely never directed at Stiles. ~ Stiles has to watch his date flirting with the most handsome man he’s ever seen. The story ends differently than he expects.Podfic of Trading Up by whimsicalmeerkat.

entry.title: [Podfic] The Moon Gave Me Permission
entry.summary:
Author: whimsicalmeerkat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 2

Summary: “I probably shouldn’t tell you this,” Scott says, eyeing Stiles’ fries. “But Derek Hale is back in town. I saw him at the gas station the other day.” This piques Stiles’ interest. Oh yes it does. Like any good true crime aficionado, Stiles has his favourite case. His pet cold case. His hometown murder. The thing he brings up when he’s tired of small talk and just wants to get real. The Hale Family Fire and the suicide of Katherine Argent. Stiles knows this case inside and out. He’s racked up thousands of karma points on reddit for his thoughtful analysis, his pictures of the crime scene, and of his reporting of local gossip. Beacon Hills is a small town, small enough that Stiles is the only one on the Unresolved Mysteries subreddit to have actually seen the burnt out shell in person. No one knows this case like Stiles does. - In which Derek Hale is a man with a dark past, and Stiles is completely obsessed with him. Podfic of The Moon Gave Me Permission by Melpomene (Aconitehart).

entry.title: comfort person
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,828Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 182

Summary: The wolf leaves the desk immediately and goes to Stiles, crouching down on the floor and bringing a hand up to cup the boy’s face. Stiles leans into Derek’s palm, looking on the verge of tears from the relief of his touch. “Did you drive here yourself?” Derek murmurs softly, stroking Stiles’ cheek with his thumb. Stiles’ own fingers loop around Derek’s wrist to keep him where he is. “Yeah,” he says, voice rough and low. “Dad was working in the next city over. Scott didn’t pick up. It was you I wanted anyway.”   Or, 5 times Derek and Stiles are each other’s comfort person, and one time they’re more.

entry.title: Starks Three Son's
entry.summary:
Author: FastFadingFiction

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,288Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 101

Summary: After Obadiah Stane dies, Pepper Potts finds a box of files that should never have existed. Stark has three boys hidden from him for years because Stane refused to let Tony have heirs. Peter Parker is still just a brilliant kid from Queens. Harley Keener is smart enough for MIT and too broke to get there. Stiles Stilinski is already neck-deep in the supernatural, dating Derek Hale, and absolutely unimpressed by Tony Stark showing up and announcing he’s his biological father.Tony can’t undo the years he lost. The only thing left to do is show up now

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski Is Not OKay
entry.summary:
Author: GhastlyHollow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,342Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Kicked out of the pack with no friends and no one to turn to, Stiles Stilinski uses the isolation to focus on herself especially now that strange supernatural changes are happening to her body. Haunted by nightmares of the Nemeton and visions of her dead mother, Stiles struggles to figure out what’s real and what isn’t as her reality begins to collapse.Meanwhile, killings start up again in Beacon Hills, and the arrival of a new alpha pack immediately raises red flags definitely not giving Deucalion 2.0 vibes… at all.As tensions rise and old alliances fall apart, Stiles finds herself uncovering a much darker truth hiding beneath it all.And through everything, through the danger, the isolation, and the fear of what she might be becoming she’s still hopelessly, painfully in love with one sour wolf.

entry.title: No One Will Find You
entry.summary:
Author: Hedwig221b

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,877Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 545

Summary: Stiles' gaze fell on the ads and random bits of paper stuck to the street pole. He ripped the offending advertisement off and was about to throw it out when his eyes caught a familiar face. Closely shorn head. Big, doe eyes, an impish smile, and his mother’s nose. Stiles stared at himself, black and white and frozen above giant letters, which spelled a bold “MISSING”.
